heading: Community Health Representatives
label: 1660f Community Health Representatives
text: The Secretary, acting through the Service, may enter into contracts with, and make grants to, urban Indian organizations for the employment of Indians trained as health service providers through the Community Health Representative Program under in the provision of health care, health promotion, and disease prevention services to urban Indians.section 1616 of this title
notes: Codificationis based on section 165 of title I of S. 1790, One Hundred Eleventh Congress, as reported by the Committee on Indian Affairs of the Senate in Dec. 2009, which was enacted into law by .Section 516 of Pub. L. 94–437section 10221(a) of Pub. L. 111–148
